default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Calendar calibration and travel planning for Marcel's upcoming New York trip.](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Optimize schedule: smarter drive times, strategic breaks, more calls vs. zooms](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [NY trip (Sun-Thu): key meetings with Peter Griggs, Alex, Ramp office visits](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Prioritize Ramp-related activities, adjusting other commitments accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Enhance calendar details: add travel buffers, meeting instructions, coffee shop preferences](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

## Topics

### Schedule Optimization Strategies

  - [Improve drive time estimates: min. 30 mins for Uber/walking](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Redistribute break spots strategically throughout days](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Convert suitable meetings to calls for increased mobility](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Remove unnecessary block overlaps for cleaner calendar view](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### New York Trip Planning (Sun-Thu)

  - [Sun: Airport arrival, buffer time for hotel check-in](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Mon:](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
      - [AM: Potential coffee with Alex (reaching out)](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [PM: Half-day with Peter Griggs (coordinating via Slack)](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [Evening: Dinner with Peter, partners (already scheduled)](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Tue: Flexible morning, Ramp office visit](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Wed:](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
      - [Full day at Ramp office (11am meeting)](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
      - [Decline other meetings, focus on Ramp interactions](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Thu:](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [AM: Return to Ramp office (aim for 8am local/5am Marcel's time)](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
      - [PM: Pack, airport transfer for 2:15pm PT/5:15pm ET flight](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

### Meeting Coordination

  - [Reach out to Alex for potential Monday/Wednesday coffee](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Contact Luke about Wednesday 11am Ramp check-in](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Ask Lightbox to reschedule Thursday meeting](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Decline conflicting meetings on Wed/Thu](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)

### Location & Logistics

  - [Coffee shop selection: prioritize light roasts, good reviews, nice ambiance](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [For in-person meetings: request specific entry instructions (gate codes, reception procedures)](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Stamped Coffee chosen for Ramp meeting (between hotel and office)](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

### Calendar Management

  - [Update time zones for reservations (correcting wife's entry)](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Add detailed travel buffers (e.g., 5:30-8:30 Marcel's time)](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Include specific blocks instead of large, general ones](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Ensure 30-min minimum for drive times](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Reach out to Peter Griggs via Slack for Monday PM coordination](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Contact Alex about potential Monday/Wednesday coffee meeting](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Message Luke regarding Wednesday Ramp check-in and office availability](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Ask Lightbox to reschedule Thursday meeting](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Update calendar with detailed buffers, travel times, and meeting instructions](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Research and add top coffee shop options near meeting locations](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Decline conflicting meetings for Wednesday and Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Coordinate with Marcel's wife on Thursday morning Ramp office visit and airport logistics](https://fathom.video/share/GDGQfpexBdhda9zyHwbUQR913zRWjgjP?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)

action_items.description: Reach out Peter Griggs via Slack. Coordinate afternoon mtg Mon. Block calendar (East Coast time)
Contact Alex re potential Mon coffee mtg in NY. Offer Wed morning alt. Mention Marcel in NY
Ask NY office for mtg instructions (gate codes, reception procedures, etc). Add to calendar event
Adjust calendar blocks. Remove overlaps. Add 30min drive times. Individualize blocks within day
Contact Luke re Ramp check-in Wed 11am. Ask if Marcel can join from Ramp office. Query other NY staff availability
Decline all non-Ramp meetings on Wed. Block schedule for getting to Ramp office by 10am
Ask Lightbox to reschedule Thurs mtg. Marcel at Ramp office Thurs morning
Block Thurs morning calendar. Marcel at Ramp office 8am local (5am his time). Add travel/packing buffer pre-flight
